overview: A full-featured event finder web app with dark glassmorphic design, real-time search, category filters, 20+ mock events, event detail modals, auth UI, security features, trending section, and fully responsive layouts.
features: Real-time search and category filters across 10 categories
Event cards with LIVE/FREE badges, organizer info, and heart toggle
Event detail modal with full info, speakers, and share/calendar/report
Auth modal with login/register and password strength meter
Security UX: input sanitization, rate limiting, cookie consent, secure checkout
Trending section, Featured Organizers, Stats bar, Newsletter, You Might Like
Dark glassmorphic design with neon hover glows and animated counters
Fully responsive: mobile hamburger/bottom-sheet, tablet 2-col, desktop 3-col
